heroDesc1: Bring every link, photo, and handwritten card into one smart, searchable cookbook powered by AI.
heroDesc2: Import anything. Organize automatically. Scale perfectly.
captureDescription: Bring in recipes from links, photos, or raw text. AI extracts ingredients, steps, and structure so you can spend more time cooking.
featureUrlImportDesc: Paste a link and get a clean, structured recipe in seconds
featurePhotosDesc: Snap a cookbook page or card and AI turns it into editable text
featureCopyPasteDesc: Drop raw text; we detect ingredients, steps, and metadata
aiDescription: Brainstorm meals, adapt for dietary needs, or invent something new just by chatting. It adapts to your style and constraints.
featureBrainstormDesc: Describe a craving and get multiple recipe concepts tailored to you
featureIngredientImageDesc: Snap what's in your fridge; get recipes you can cook now
featureModificationDesc: Make any recipe gluten-free, higher-protein, or scaled for two instantly
searchDescription: Search by ingredients on hand, dietary needs, cuisine, cooking method, time, and more—combine filters to pinpoint what to cook next.
featureFullTextDesc: Look through titles, ingredients, notes, and imported text
featureSmartFiltersDesc: Stack diet, difficulty, cuisine, time, method, and more for precise discovery
finalCtaDescription: Replace screenshots, bookmarks, and scattered notes with one living recipe library.
